regions.text: Famous sayings live on in our minds. For centuries, Chinese children started reading with this: 'Men’s nature is good.' (Mencius, 4th century B.C.).
From the Chung Yung: 'What makes us is named our nature. What directs our nature is named the Way. What makes the Way possible is education.'
our nature: who we truly ARE. directs: gives guidance to. FUTURE: will direct. PRESENT: direct(s). PAST: directed.
